name: linkedincli
description: Access LinkedIn via a reverse-engineered CLI: view profiles, read/post to feed, search people and jobs, and check notifications.
instructions: Before using any tool, ensure the plugin is configured with a valid li_at cookie. The init script will authenticate automatically. All tools return JSON. Write operations (feed_post, feed_comment, feed_react, feed_unreact) hit LinkedIn's live systems — use with care.

li_at.description: LinkedIn li_at session cookie. Extract from browser DevTools: Application > Cookies > linkedin.com > li_at.
